basics.name: Anand Bhaskaran
basics.label: Senior Software Engineer | Technical Lead | Startup Mentor | MBA | AI
basics.summary: AI-driven Senior Software Engineer with over 10 years of experience in developing and deploying machine learning solutions. Successfully delivered advanced generative AI systems, optimizing operational efficiency and saving $337K in costs. Proven track record of collaboratively designing scalable applications while mentoring engineers and driving innovation across multifaceted projects that enhance user engagement.

work.name: Beekeeper AG
work.summary: Technical Lead driving innovation in Generative AI solutions and scalable platforms, enhancing customer engagement and revenue growth.
highlights: Led architectural design and launch of Employee Referral System (99.99% SLA) — generated $1.5M+ revenue including $500K ARR through agile methodologies and customer-focused iteration
Spearheaded development of Beekeeper's Templating Engine — reduced setup time by 90% and now powers 15% of all platform assets, significantly enhancing user engagement
Engineered robust search interface accommodating 10M+ users — substantially elevated user engagement and accelerated platform adoption rate
Designed and deployed advanced generative AI translation systems using GitHub Actions and OpenAI APIs — saved $337K and accelerated go-to-market since Jan 2024
Mentored junior engineers and acted as technical hiring manager, fostering a culture of continuous learning and high-quality code delivery
Drove cross-functional initiatives leading to key features like Employee Referral and Search Revamp, enhancing product offerings and user experience
Collaborated with product managers to run A/B experiments, deriving insights that informed product iterations and improved customer satisfaction

work.name: Tenity
work.summary: Mentor and panelist providing strategic guidance on generative AI solutions and scalability to emerging tech startups.
highlights: Conducted thorough technology evaluations for seed-to-VC startups, facilitating growth and enabling them to devise impactful, scalable solutions
Advised startups on technical hiring and AI adoption strategies, directly contributing to increased operational efficiency and innovation

work.name: Dronistics
work.summary: Founding engineer of an autonomous drone delivery system, driving innovation in logistics with a focus on performance optimization.
highlights: Engineered an autonomous drone delivery platform — successfully conducted over 500 last-mile deliveries
Reduced delivery times by 40% with real-time flight control APIs and logistics optimization algorithms while maintaining a 99.5% safety record
Delivered complete cloud infrastructure and DevOps pipeline enabling scalable operations for strategic enterprise partnerships

work.name: EPFL — Laboratory of Intelligent Systems (Robogen)
work.summary: Led engineering efforts for Robogen, an innovative open-source platform integrating AI and robotics for advanced research.
highlights: Spearheaded migration to AWS, enhancing platform capabilities and securing AWS Research Credits, featured on the AWS Research Blog
Supervised over 20 master's students in robotics and AI research projects, fostering the next generation of tech innovators
Contributed to impactful research in artificial evolution, earning recognition in academia and industry

education.institution: Quantic School of Business and Technology

publications.name: AI and creativity
publications.summary: Keynote presentation exploring the intersection of artificial intelligence and human creativity, demonstrating how AI can augment rather than replace creative processes in product development.

publications.name: From Infinite possibilites to finite Results
publications.publisher: AI for the rest of Us, UK (Talk)
publications.summary: Strategic framework presentation on transforming unlimited AI potential into measurable business outcomes through systematic implementation and practical constraint design.

publications.name: Designing Robots Through Artificial Evolution
publications.summary: Featured technical article showcasing breakthrough research in evolutionary robotics, demonstrating how AWS cloud infrastructure enables large-scale artificial evolution simulations for autonomous system design.

awards.title: TI India Analog Design Contest Winner

projects.name: PulseView - AI Market Intelligence
highlights: Built AI-powered real-time stock market analysis platform, enabling traders to generate and explain trading signals.
Focused on explainable AI to enhance clarity and speed in financial decision-making.
Transitioned from a personal tool to a public platform, broadening access for retail traders.

projects.name: SwissNRI - Cross-border Fintech Platform
highlights: Led the development of a unique platform catering to cross-border financial challenges for Indian nationals in Switzerland.
Achieved a 40% increase in user satisfaction through customer-driven product iterations.
Implemented compliance-first design addressing key regulatory requirements across multiple jurisdictions.

projects.name: Proplab - AI Real Estate Tools
highlights: Designed a digitalized property inventory inspection system that replaced manual workflows, enhancing operational efficiency.
Currently developing an AI marketing assistant that automates listing creation, significantly increasing property visibility.
Implemented structured inspection protocols with AI and image processing technologies.

_jobApplication.jobDescription:
Are you looking to work at the forefront of Machine Learning and AI? Would you be excited to apply Generative AI algorithms to solve real world problems with significant impact? The AWS Industries Team at AWS helps AWS customers implement Generative AI solutions and realize transformational business opportunities for AWS customers in the most strategic industry verticals. This is a team of data scientists, engineers, and architects working step-by-step with customers to build bespoke solutions that harness the power of generative AI.

The team helps customers imagine and scope the use cases that will create the greatest value for their businesses, select and train and fine tune the right models, define paths to navigate technical or business challenges, develop proof-of-concepts, and build applications to launch these solutions at scale. The AWS Industries team provides guidance and implements best practices for applying generative AI responsibly and cost efficiently.

You will work directly with customers and innovate in a fast-paced organization that contributes to game-changing projects and technologies. You will design and run experiments, research new algorithms, and find new ways of optimizing risk, profitability, and customer experience.

In this role you will be capable of using GenAI and other techniques to design, evangelize, and implement and scale solutions for never-before-solved problems.

Key job responsibilities
Collaborate with AI/ML scientists, engineers, and architects to research, design, develop, and evaluate generative AI algorithms and build ML systems to address real-world challenges

Interact with customers directly to understand the business problem, help and aid them in implementation of generative AI solutions, deliver briefing and deep dive sessions to customers and guide customer on adoption patterns and paths to production

Create and deliver best practice recommendations, tutorials, blog posts, publications, sample code, and presentations adapted to technical, business, and executive stakeholder

About the team
Diverse Experiences
Amazon values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the preferred qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.

Why AWS
Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.

Work/Life Balance
We value work-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve in the cloud.

Inclusive Team Culture
Here at AWS, it’s in our nature to learn and be curious. Our employee-led affinity groups foster a culture of inclusion that empower us to be proud of our differences.

Mentorship and Career Growth
We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge-sharing, mentorship and other career-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better-rounded professional.

BASIC QUALIFICATIONS
PhD, or Master's degree and 3+ years of applied research experience
5+ years of building machine learning models for business application experience
Experience with programming in Java, Python or related language
Experience with neural deep learning methods and machine learning

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS
Experience with LLM pre-training, fine-tuning, and evaluations
Familiarity with distributed training and acceleration method/implementation/library for LLMs or large-scale ML in general, e.g., DeepSpeed, Nemo-Megatron, PyTorch Lightning.
science backgrounds demonstrated by degrees in fields such as:
Mathematics
Statistics
Physics (various specializations)
Molecular Biology
Neuroscience
Experience manipulating large datasets using RDBMS or SQL-on-Hadoop technologies, and be familiar with machine learning or statistical libraries like SparkML, scikit-learn, caret, mlr, and MLlib
